creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bug 206151 provided a Summary: containing:

emulators/open-vm-tools*

This was used to indicate that the issue was relevant to:

* emulators/open-vm-tools
* emulators/open-vm-tools-nox11

In this case the AutoAssigner did not match any ports.

This issue may be translated into a *potential* feature, depending on feasibility:

"Support matching multiple ports with category/portname[*,[{x,y}]] syntax"

There are other ways multiple ports have been indicated in previous issues, including:

lang/python{27,34}
